Class Main

java.lang.Object
Main
public class Main extends Object
Main class provides the menu-driven interface for managing songs, playlists, and controlling audio playback. Also supports launching the Swing GUI. Features: - Load playlists from CSV files. - Manipulate songs using a custom linked list. - Manage and play songs through a playlist wrapper. - Control audio (play, stop, pause, resume, volume, etc.). - Search for songs and view playlist statistics. - Save/export playlist to CSV. - Launch GUI that displays and plays the current playlist.

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Entry point of the program. Displays the main menu and dispatches control to the appropriate submenu based on user choice.

    • intValidation

      public static int intValidation()
      Reads an integer from the shared Scanner, reprompting until valid.

    • stringValidation

      public static String stringValidation()
      Reads a full line of text from the shared Scanner, reprompting if needed.

    • promptSong

      public static Song promptSong()
      Prompts the user for Song fields and constructs a Song. Accepts duration as "mm:ss" or just seconds. Returns null if invalid format.

    • parseFlexibleDuration

      public static int parseFlexibleDuration(String s)
      Parses a duration entered as "mm:ss" or plain seconds. Returns -1 if the input format is invalid.

    • printMenu

      public static void printMenu()
      Prints the top-level menu options.

    • fileOperations

      public static void fileOperations()
      Prints the file operations submenu.

    • DoublyLinkedSongListOperation

      public static void DoublyLinkedSongListOperation()
      Prints the low-level DoublyLinkedSongList operations submenu.

    • playListBasics

      public static void playListBasics()
      Prints the playlist wrapper (high-level) operations submenu.

    • audioControls

      public static void audioControls()
      Prints the audio controls submenu.

    • saveAndExport

      public static void saveAndExport()
      Prints the save/export submenu.
